title: Lesson Allocation – Cancel Order with Past Effective Date – Slot-Based – LA Deleted
description: AC 06.2, AC 06.6 — State Transition / BVA — Validates that cancelling a Slot-Based product order with an effective date in the past deletes the LA entirely.
preconditions:
* User has created an order with product type = Slot-Based; Require Allocation flag = True; order start date = 2026-01-01
* LA exists for the student with start date = 2026-01-01
* User has created an individual lesson and added this student to the lesson
steps_actions:
1. Go to Student Detail → Click "New Order Group" → Select location → Save
2. At Order Group Product, click "Manage" → Select the Slot-Based product → Click "Cancel"
3. Enter effective date = 2026-03-01 (past date < current date 2026-04-02)
4. Click "Save Draft"
5. Click "Submit"
6. Navigate to Contact → Course tab → Lesson Allocation list
7. Check lesson assignment
steps_result:
1. Order Group created
2. Cancel order form opens
3. Effective date field shows 2026-03-01; no inline error
4. Order saved as draft with no error
5. Order submitted successfully
6. LA for this Slot-Based product is deleted; no entry visible
7. Student is removed from lessons that were linked to this LA

title: Lesson Allocation – Enrollment Order with Past Start Date – LA Created with Past Start Date
description: AC 02.2 — CRUD Testing — Validates that creating an enrollment application with a past start date results in an LA being created with start date = the past date.
preconditions:
* User has created a product offering with package types = One-Time, Schedule, Frequency, and Slot-Based; each product has Course A added with Require Allocation flag = True
* User has created a student with a grade and location = product offering
* User has created a recurring group lesson with class
* Current date = 2026-04-02
steps_actions:
1. Go to Student Detail → Click "Create Enrollment Application" button
2. At Order Group Product, click "Manage" → Click "Add Product" → Select the product offering and course offering → Assign a class
3. Enter start date = 2026-01-15 (past date < current date 2026-04-02)
4. Click "Save Draft"
5. Click "Submit Enrollment"
6. Navigate to Contact → Course tab → Require Lesson Allocation and Lesson Allocation lists
7. Check LA duration on one of the created LAs
8. Check total session count
9. Check class assignment
steps_result:
1. Enrollment application form opens
2. Product and course selected; class assigned
3. Start date field shows 2026-01-15; no inline error
4. Enrollment saved as draft with no error
5. Enrollment submitted successfully
6. LAs are created for each product type with start date = 2026-01-15
7. Start date = 2026-01-15; end date = order end date
8. Total session count = 0; no student session auto-created
9. Class member created with start date & end date = LA duration

title: Lesson Allocation – Update Slot – Past Effective Date – Purchased Slot Updated, Duration Unchanged
description: AC 05.1, AC 05.2, AC 05.3, AC 05.6 — BVA — Validates that updating slot/week on a Frequency product with a past effective date updates purchased slot and recalculates total session count while leaving LA duration unchanged.
preconditions:
* User has created an order with product type = Frequency; Require Allocation flag = True; order start date = 2026-01-01
* LA exists; current purchased slot/week = 2
* User has assigned the student to a group lesson by class
* Current date = 2026-04-02
steps_actions:
1. Go to Student Detail → Click "New Order Group" → Select location → Save
2. At Order Group Product, click "Manage" → Select the Frequency product → Click "Update"
3. Increase slot/week from 2 to 3 → Enter effective date = 2026-02-01 (past date < current date)
4. Click "Save Draft"
5. Click "Submit"
6. Navigate to Contact → Course tab → Lesson Allocation
7. Check LA duration
8. Check total session count
9. Check student session
steps_result:
1. Order Group created
2. Update order form opens
3. Slot/week field shows 3; effective date shows 2026-02-01; no inline error
4. Order saved as draft with no error
5. Order submitted successfully
6. Purchased slot on LA updated to 3/week
7. LA start date and end date are unchanged from original order
8. Total session count recalculated based on new slot/week value
9. No new student session auto-created

* LA exists; current purchased slot/week = 2

3. Increase slot/week from 2 to 3 → Enter effective date = 2026-04-02 (= current date)
4. Click "Save Draft" → Click "Submit"

6. Check LA duration
7. Check total session count
steps_result:
